meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve Debugging (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Master Git with AI to crush complex bugs. A high-level checklist for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate shipping and client delivery.
content.answer_block: Stop staring at broken logs. Combine Git versioning with AI-driven analysis to pinpoint regression points instantly. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural context and Claude Code for iterative repairs, you transform debugging from a manual, high-latency task into a streamlined, automated workflow that keeps your client projects on schedule.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and your codebase has descended into a labyrinth of obscure runtime errors. You’ve refactored, you’ve reverted, yet the bug remains—an invisible ghost in the machine that threatens your reputation and your bottom line. 

But the era of manual trial-and-error debugging is dead. By integrating Git-aware AI agents into your development lifecycle, you move from guessing to surgical precision. This is how the top 1% of freelance engineers ship stable, high-performance SaaS products without the agony of prolonged debugging sessions.

steps.title: Isolate the Regression via Git Bisect
steps.description: Use Git to find the exact commit that introduced the bug, then hand that diff to your AI agent for analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the diff between the current HEAD and the last known stable commit. Identify the specific function or logic change that likely triggered the current runtime error.
steps.claude_code_command: git bisect start; git bisect bad HEAD; git bisect good [stable_commit_hash]

steps.title: Contextualize the Debug Session
steps.description: Inject project architecture into Claude Code to ensure the fix respects your existing design patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Explain the architectural relationship between this module and the global state management. How does this specific bug break the data flow?

steps.title: Simulate and Verify with AI
steps.description: Generate comprehensive unit tests that specifically target the identified failure point before writing the fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Jest test case that recreates this specific bug. Ensure the test fails as expected before we attempt a fix.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a reproduction test file for the bug'

steps.title: Execute Surgical Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix using the AI agent, ensuring you maintain Git history integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a patch that resolves the bug while strictly adhering to the existing TypeScript interfaces and avoiding breaking changes.

steps.title: Validate and Commit
steps.description: Verify the fix with your test suite and commit with an AI-generated, descriptive message.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current changes and generate a conventional commit message that highlights the bug fix and the technical impact.
steps.claude_code_command: git commit -m 'fix: resolve race condition in auth service' && git push

pro_tips: Always run your AI analysis against a clean branch to avoid polluting your main environment with experimental debug logs.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' comments in your code for future technical debt tracking before you merge your fix.
When Claude Code gets stuck, force it to 'read' the entire relevant dependency tree by explicitly adding the node_modules or lib folders to its context.
Create a custom .clauderc file to define your coding style, so the AI always formats code exactly as your linter expects.
Use Git hooks to trigger an automated AI linting and security scan every time you commit a fix for a high-priority production bug.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI-driven Git workflows into your CI/CD pipeline to automate regression testing and ensure your future builds are bug-free by default.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical edge to turn debugging from a bottleneck into a competitive advantage. Stop fighting your code and start commanding it with the power of AI-integrated version control. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
